strengths: 13+ years of fullstack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, React, and multiple languages
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong engineering culture background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java experience is older (robotics, mobile orchestration)
Cloud experience appears AWS-only; no mention of GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin signal

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned fullstack engineer with a strong TypeScript/Node/React core, directly relevant AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq, and a track record of craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing). Gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned) and limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure, but the polyglot history and architecture experience make ramp-up low-risk.
